category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/fern-api/fern describes Fern as transforming API definitions into SDKs and documentation.
source_facts.description says it provides SDKs and docs for APIs.
display_name_sources: Official documentation at https://buildwithfern.com/learn uses the product name Fern.
Official repository is under the fern-api organization and README title is Fern.
docs_sources: Official Fern documentation site at https://buildwithfern.com/learn links SDKs, Docs, and CLI Reference.
Official GitHub README at https://github.com/fern-api/fern links to all CLI command documentation on buildwithfern.com.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/fern-api/fern describes the CLI install command `npm install -g fern-api`.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official GitHub organization and repository.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/fern-api/fern says Fern supports OpenAPI and generates SDKs and API documentation.
